projects.title: TaskDuty
projects.description: A full-stack task manager with accounts, protected routes, and task data isolated per user.
projects.contribution: I connected the React client to an Express and MongoDB API, added authentication and ownership checks, and backed the system with 31 automated tests.

projects.title: Around the Globe
projects.description: A country explorer for searching, filtering, and opening detailed profiles for 250 countries and territories.
projects.contribution: I tightened its responsive states, search accessibility, direct routes, not-found handling, and deployment rewrites.
projects.imageAlt: Around the Globe country explorer showing searchable country cards

projects.title: Calculator
projects.description: A keyboard-friendly calculator with chained arithmetic, percentage handling, saved themes, and readable output.
projects.contribution: I separated the calculation engine, covered its behavior with tests, and fixed the small state details that make repeated calculations feel right.
projects.imageAlt: Dark themed calculator with number and operation controls

projects.title: Space Tourism Explorer
projects.description: An animated Frontend Mentor project covering destinations, crew members, and launch technology.
projects.contribution: I used route-based screens, responsive layouts, and measured transitions to turn the supplied design into a working browser experience.
projects.imageAlt: Space Tourism destination screen featuring the Moon
